title: Tracing, Evals, and Failure Analysis · Durable Agent Mission
summary: A high-stakes incident coordinator. The coordinator needs parallel evidence gathering with permissions, traceability, synthesis, and explicit stop conditions. Planned artifact: Deliver Human-Controlled Multi-Agent Investigation with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Place approvals immediately before consequential effects with enough evidence to decide.
Delegate only concrete independent work with a clear return contract.
Verify subagent claims and integrate evidence rather than concatenating outputs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
